scenario.command: python benchmarks/baseline/musetalk_baseline_runner.py --mode warm_start --policy-config benchmarks/baseline/policies/warm_path_policy.json --policy-mode default --infer-cmd 'python benchmarks/baseline/fixtures/approx_infer.py --frames-dir benchmarks/baseline/tmp/frames --audio-accept-ms 50 --post-accept-startup-ms 0 --chunk-ms {chunk_ms} --startup-chunks {startup_chunks} --chunk-overhead-ms 8 --cadence-profile fixed --fps 20 --num-frames 20 --disable-frame-write --emit-metrics-json' --frame-glob 'benchmarks/baseline/tmp/frames/*.png' --prefer-infer-json --cleanup-glob 'benchmarks/baseline/tmp/frames/*.png' --lifecycle-session-start-cmd 'echo session-start' --lifecycle-avatar-ready-cmd 'echo avatar-ready-fallback' --lifecycle-audio-accepted-cmd 'echo audio-accepted' --enable-limited-real-lifecycle-wiring --real-avatar-ready-path runtime/session/README.md --allow-proxy-fallback-on-real-wire-failure --real-first-frame-source infer_json --enable-flagged-e2e-session-experiment
